description: Form container that connects input fields to a database table. Children (TextBox, CheckBox, ComboBox, etc.) bind to columns via their 'dataField' prop. A Button with action='submit' saves the form data to the target table.

sourceTable.description: DB table to READ initial values from. Leave empty for a create-only form.

filterField.description: Filter field to select which record to load from sourceTable

filterValue.description: Filter value or {{template}}. Commonly set to a record ID.

targetTable.description: DB table to WRITE to when the form is submitted (Button action='submit')

notes: Input/TextBox children must have 'dataField' set to the column name they bind to.
For a login form: sourceTable='Users', targetTable='Users', add TextBox(dataField='email') + TextBox(dataField='password', inputType='password') + Button(action='submit' or action='login').
For a create form: only set targetTable. Leave sourceTable empty.
For an edit form: set both sourceTable and filterField/filterValue to load the record, and targetTable to save it.
